item.title: Welcome to Heiman Technology Wiki
item.description: Welcome to the Heiman Technology Wiki! This is the official knowledge base, bringing together product documentation, technical solutions, industry news, and company updates.
item.content:encoded:
Welcome to the Heiman Technology Wiki! This is the official knowledge base, bringing together product documentation, technical solutions, industry news, and company updates.

About This Site​

The Heiman Technology Wiki is dedicated to providing a one-stop technical resource for partners, developers, and customers:

  • Products — Smart Fire Safety, Smart Gas Safety, Smart Elderly Care, Smart Sensors
  • Solutions — Industry-level smart security solutions
  • Technical Docs — API integration guides, SDK usage, installation manuals
  • Industry Insights — Smart security trends and policy解读

Quick Navigation​

  • Browse Products & Solutions
  • Read About Us to learn Heiman's story
  • Visit the Heiman Official Site

For any questions, call our hotline 400-8959-500 or contact online support.

item.title: Heiman Matter Smart Smoke Alarm Officially Launched
item.description: Heiman Technology's new generation Matter protocol smart smoke alarm, the HS1SA-M, has been officially launched — one of the industry's first smoke alarms to receive Matter 1.2 certification.
item.content:encoded:
Heiman Technology's new generation Matter protocol smart smoke alarm, the HS1SA-M, has been officially launched — one of the industry's first smoke alarms to receive Matter 1.2 certification.

tip

The HS1SA-M supports Apple HomeKit, Amazon Alexa, Google Home, and Samsung SmartThings — the four major smart home ecosystems.

Key Features​

  • Matter 1.2 Certified — Cross-brand, cross-ecosystem interoperability
  • Photoelectric Smoke Sensing — Rapid response to various fire smoke types
  • Voice Alarm — Multiple language options, clear hazard alerts
  • Self-Test Function — Regular self-checks to ensure normal operation
  • Remote Notification — Real-time push alerts to your phone APP

Compatibility​

The HS1SA-M seamlessly integrates with major smart home platforms without requiring an additional gateway — manage everything directly from your phone.

Visit the Products page to learn more.

item.title: Heiman Technology Milestones
item.description: Since its founding in 2005, Heiman Technology has journeyed over 20 years. This article回顾s Heiman's key milestones.
item.content:encoded:
Since its founding in 2005, Heiman Technology has journeyed over 20 years. This article回顾s Heiman's key milestones.

2005 - Company Founded​

Shenzhen Heiman Technology Co., Ltd. was officially established, entering the security sensor field.

2006 - International Start​

Multiple products passed EU CE certification and partnered with China Mobile.

2011 - International Certification Breakthrough​

Multiple products passed EU EN54-7 and EN14604 certifications, reaching international quality standards.

2012 - Smart Home Transformation​

The smart home project was fully launched, transitioning Heiman into a company specializing in R&D, production, and sales of smart home products.

2017 - Major Breakthroughs​

  • Developed China's first NB-IoT smoke alarm
  • Won 2 Red Dot Design Awards
  • Passed MFi certification, qualified as an Apple manufacturer

2020 - Capital Boost​

Completed Series A financing with Shenzhen高新投 Group, recognized as "Guangdong Province Specialized and New SME".

2022 - National Recognition​

Recognized as National Specialized and New "Little Giant" Enterprise. K1 series won Red Dot Design Award.

2023 - International Standards Leadership​

Heiman testing lab officially passed CNAS certification. Smoke alarms and CO alarms首批获得 Matter 1.2 certification.

2024 - Present​

Continuing innovation, deepening commitment to Smart Fire Safety, Smart Gas Safety, Smart Elderly Care, and Smart Sensors, providing quality products and services to customers in 100+ countries worldwide.

item.title: Heinan Technology Recognized as National "Little Giant" Enterprise
item.description: In 2022, Heiman Technology was officially recognized as a National Specialized and New "Little Giant" Enterprise for its deep technical accumulation and innovation in the smart sensor field.
item.content:encoded:
In 2022, Heiman Technology was officially recognized as a National Specialized and New "Little Giant" Enterprise for its deep technical accumulation and innovation in the smart sensor field.

This national-level recognition affirms Heiman's excellence in specialization, refinement, differentiation, and innovation. Heiman will continue to deepen its efforts in Smart Fire Safety, Smart Gas Safety, Smart Elderly Care, and Smart Sensors, consistently delivering high-quality products and services to customers.

Heiman had previously received recognition as a National High-Tech Enterprise and a Guangdong Province Specialized and New SME.
